'''Gordun''' was a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] who served in the [[Aerial Plankton Uprising]]. With the help of [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]], he vanquished the [[Kinkee]]s.
